message:
test(fr-conformance): wire live oracle diff for zsets + streams (br-frankenredis-eud6, br-frankenredis-1b89)

Adds live_redis_core_zset_matches_runtime (324 non-blocking of ~346 total)
and live_redis_core_stream_matches_runtime (218 non-blocking; XREAD BLOCK
cases filtered).

First-run parity vs vendored redis-server:
  - core_zset:   318/324 pass, 6 divergences
  - core_stream: 170/218 pass, 48 divergences (bulk is XADD auto-ID clock drift)

Divergences filed as [HIGH] review beads:
  - 19ic: ZINTERCARD/ZMPOP/BZMPOP numkeys + ZRANGEBYSCORE LIMIT wording
  - xy1q: XADD auto-ID fixture-clock vs wall-clock drift + XADD strict-monotonic ID check

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
